title: eolfix Configuration
description: Line ending normalization rules for eolfix.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation.

default.description: Default target line ending for files that don't match any force rule (default: 'lf').

force_lf.description: Files that must use LF line endings (e.g. shell scripts, Makefiles).

ignore_default.description: Hardcoded extensions to remove from built-in LF defaults.

force_crlf.description: Files that must use CRLF line endings.

extensions.description: File extensions that must use CRLF (e.g. '.sln').

ignore_default.description: Hardcoded extensions to remove from built-in defaults (e.g. ['bat'] drops *.bat).

force_cr.description: Files that must use CR line endings (legacy Mac).

ignore_default.description: Hardcoded extensions to remove from defaults.

ignore.description: Files and directories to skip entirely.
